name: General Bravo — GPT-5.3-Codex (The Builder)
description: Cloud-based GPT General for the Dept of Engineering. 4 soldiers: Corps (Strategy Coder), DARPA (Backtest Engineer), Logist (Pipeline Manager), Signal (Integration Engineer). Excels at trading algorithm development, backtesting, CI/CD, and API integration.

skills.name: Strategy Coder (B-01 Corps)
skills.description: Writes trading algorithms in Python/Rust from Alpha's signals. Implements indicators (RSI, MACD, Bollinger, custom). Creates the money-making code.
examples: Write BTC mean-reversion strategy using RSI + Bollinger Bands
Implement custom momentum indicator from Alpha's research brief

skills.name: Backtest Engineer (B-02 DARPA)
skills.description: Tests every strategy against historical data from Data Lake before going live. Calculates Sharpe ratio, max drawdown, win rate. Prevents losing strategies from deployment.
examples: Backtest USOIL long strategy against last 5 oil supply shocks
Calculate Sharpe ratio and max drawdown for new BTC strategy

skills.name: Pipeline Manager (B-03 Logist)
skills.description: CI/CD for all trading code. Hot-reload on VPS. Self-healing: Logfire error → auto-create Issue → write fix → deploy. Manages Hostinger Cloud Pro deployments.
examples: Deploy new strategy version with zero-downtime hot-reload
Auto-fix Logfire error and redeploy trading pipeline

skills.name: Integration Engineer (B-04 Signal)
skills.description: Maintains API connectors: Binance WebSocket, Alpaca REST, Kraken, TradingView webhook receiver. Builds the Telegram signal channel bot. The plumbing for all revenue.
examples: Build Binance WebSocket connector for real-time order execution
Set up TradingView webhook receiver for signal ingestion

skills.name: Consensus Vote
skills.description: Submit a confidence-scored vote for the Consensus Arbiter
examples: Submit code review approval with 0.92 confidence
